title: IT & Systems Administration
summary: Where the range started. I worked the full IT ladder — from front-line support to systems administration — and learned that credibility with a system comes from having actually run it.
bullets: Adams State University (Computing Services): Level I to Level II technician and IT intern; automated daily operations with PowerShell and coordinated a team of technicians.
HDR: IT Support Specialist to Systems Administrator across an engineering and architecture firm — SCCM/MDT, LanDesk, VDI, and VMware vSphere.
Turned repetitive operations into scripted, reliable automation.
